description: Teks Rekon (Recount Text) adalah teks yang menceritakan kembali peristiwa atau pengalaman yang benar-benar terjadi di masa lampau secara kronologis, objektif, dan faktual. Tujuannya adalah memberi informasi atau menghibur pembaca tentang apa yang terjadi, kapan, di mana, dan siapa yang terlibat. Ciri utamanya adalah penggunaan Simple Past Tense, kata kerja tindakan, dan kata penghubung waktu.

questions.text: What is a recount text?
questions.explanation: Recount text adalah teks yang menceritakan kembali (retells) peristiwa atau pengalaman yang sudah terjadi di masa lampau.

options.text: A. A text that describes the features of an object
B. A text that retells past events or experiences
C. A text that explains how to do something
D. A text that argues for an opinion

questions.text: What is the main social function (purpose) of a recount text?
questions.explanation: Fungsi utama recount text adalah melaporkan atau menceritakan kembali peristiwa masa lampau (to inform or entertain by retelling past events).

options.text: A. To persuade the reader to take action
B. To inform or entertain by retelling past events
C. To describe a place in detail
D. To give instructions step by step

questions.text: A factual recount is based mainly on ....
questions.explanation: Teks rekon fakta (factual recount) didasarkan pada fakta, data, dan bukti, bukan imajinasi atau opini penulis.

options.text: C. Personal opinions and feelings only

questions.text: In what order are the events in a recount text usually told?
questions.explanation: Peristiwa dalam recount diceritakan secara kronologis (chronological order), yaitu sesuai urutan waktu kejadiannya.

questions.text: Which question is NOT typically answered by a recount text?
questions.explanation: Recount menjawab who, when, where, dan how (urutan kejadian). Pertanyaan 'how to make something' adalah ciri procedure text, bukan recount.

options.text: B. When and where did it happen?
C. How to make or do something step by step?

questions.text: A diary entry, a biography, and a news report are common examples of which text type?
questions.explanation: Diary, biografi, dan laporan berita menceritakan peristiwa yang sudah terjadi, sehingga termasuk recount text.

questions.text: A good factual recount should be ....
questions.explanation: Recount fakta bersifat objektif dan informatif, melaporkan peristiwa tanpa menambahkan opini atau imajinasi penulis.

options.text: A. Subjective and full of the writer's opinions

questions.text: Which of the following is the BEST topic for a personal recount?
questions.explanation: Personal recount menceritakan pengalaman pribadi, misalnya 'My holiday in Bali last year'.

options.text: A. How to cook fried rice
B. My holiday in Bali last year
D. The characteristics of a tiger

questions.text: The difference between a recount and a narrative text is that a narrative usually has ....
questions.explanation: Narrative memiliki konflik dan resolusi (complication & resolution), sedangkan recount hanya melaporkan urutan peristiwa tanpa konflik wajib.

options.text: A. A series of events in time order
C. The use of past tense
D. An orientation at the beginning

questions.text: What are the three main parts of the generic structure of a recount text, in order?
questions.explanation: Struktur recount: Orientation (orientasi), Series of Events (runtutan peristiwa), Reorientation (reorientasi).

options.text: B. Orientation, Series of Events, Reorientation

questions.text: Which part of a recount text introduces who, when, and where?
questions.explanation: Orientation adalah bagian pembuka yang memberi latar belakang: siapa, kapan, dan di mana peristiwa terjadi.

questions.text: Which part of a recount tells the events in chronological order?
questions.explanation: Series of Events (runtutan peristiwa) adalah inti teks yang menceritakan urutan kejadian secara kronologis.

questions.text: Which part of a recount restates or summarizes the events at the end?
questions.explanation: Reorientation adalah bagian penutup yang menyatakan ulang atau menyimpulkan peristiwa, sering berisi ringkasan atau akibat.

questions.text: Which part of a recount text is considered optional?
questions.explanation: Reorientation bersifat opsional; sebuah recount tetap lengkap meski hanya berisi orientation dan series of events.

questions.text: "Last Saturday, my family and I went to the National Museum in Jakarta." This sentence belongs to which part?
questions.explanation: Kalimat ini memperkenalkan kapan, siapa, dan di mana, sehingga merupakan bagian Orientation.

questions.text: "All in all, it was an unforgettable and meaningful trip for everyone." This sentence is part of the ....
questions.explanation: Kalimat penutup yang menyimpulkan dan memberi kesan umum termasuk Reorientation.

questions.text: "First, we registered at the gate. Then, a guide explained the safety rules. After that, we entered the workshop." This passage belongs to the ....
questions.explanation: Bagian ini menceritakan urutan kejadian secara kronologis dengan kata penghubung waktu, sehingga termasuk Series of Events.

questions.text: The orientation of a recount text mainly functions to ....
questions.explanation: Orientation memberikan informasi latar belakang (background) agar pembaca memahami konteks peristiwa.

options.text: A. Set the background and introduce the participants
B. Give a personal comment about the events
D. Present arguments for a thesis

questions.text: Which term is another common name for the 'Series of Events' part?
questions.explanation: Series of Events juga disebut 'Events' atau 'Record of Events', yaitu bagian yang merekam urutan kejadian.

questions.text: A reorientation that adds the writer's personal comment or evaluation about the events is sometimes called a ....
questions.explanation: Komentar pribadi penulis di akhir recount kadang disebut 'personal comment' atau 'coda'.

questions.text: What is the dominant tense used in a recount text?
questions.explanation: Recount menceritakan peristiwa yang sudah selesai, sehingga tense dominan adalah Simple Past Tense.

questions.text: Which type of verbs is mostly used in a recount text?
questions.explanation: Recount banyak menggunakan action verbs (verba tindakan) seperti went, arrived, dan explained.

questions.text: Which language feature is used to show the order of events in a recount?
questions.explanation: Time conjunctions (kata penghubung waktu) seperti first, then, dan after that menunjukkan urutan kronologis.

questions.text: Why is the passive voice often used in formal factual recounts?
questions.explanation: Passive voice digunakan untuk menekankan peristiwa atau objek, bukan pelakunya, sehingga laporan terasa lebih objektif.

options.text: A. To emphasize the doer of the action
B. To emphasize the event or object rather than the doer
C. To make the text shorter

questions.text: Recount texts often use specific nouns and phrases such as names, places, and dates in order to ....
questions.explanation: Penggunaan nama, tempat, dan tanggal yang spesifik bertujuan menjaga keakuratan fakta (factual accuracy).

options.text: A. Make the text more imaginative
D. Hide the identity of participants

questions.text: Which of these is a typical language feature of recount text?
questions.explanation: Recount menggunakan past tense, action verbs, dan time conjunctions. Penggunaan imperative (kalimat perintah) adalah ciri procedure text.

options.text: B. Past tense and time conjunctions
C. Present tense and adjectives only

questions.text: Personal pronouns such as I, we, and they are common in recount texts because the text ....
questions.explanation: Recount sering menceritakan keterlibatan orang/pelaku, sehingga personal pronouns digunakan untuk merujuk para partisipan.

options.text: A. Gives instructions to the reader
B. Refers to the participants involved in the events
C. Describes physical features of objects

questions.text: Adverbs of time and place (e.g., yesterday, at the harbor) are used in recounts to ....
questions.explanation: Adverbs of time dan place memberi keterangan kapan dan di mana peristiwa terjadi, memperjelas konteks faktual.

options.text: A. Show when and where the events happened

questions.text: Which sentence uses the correct tense for a recount text?
questions.explanation: Recount memakai Simple Past Tense. 'We visited the factory last week' menggunakan past tense yang benar.

options.text: A. We visit the factory last week.
B. We visited the factory last week.
C. We will visit the factory last week.
D. We are visiting the factory last week.

questions.text: What is the past form of the verb "go"?
questions.explanation: 'Go' adalah kata kerja tidak beraturan (irregular verb); bentuk lampaunya adalah 'went'.

questions.text: What is the past form of the verb "arrive"?
questions.explanation: 'Arrive' adalah regular verb, bentuk lampaunya dibentuk dengan menambah -d, yaitu 'arrived'.

questions.text: What is the past form of the verb "begin"?
questions.explanation: 'Begin' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya adalah 'began' (V2), sedangkan 'begun' adalah V3 (past participle).

questions.text: Choose the correct past tense sentence.
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau 'see' adalah 'saw'. 'The manager saw the report and signed it' benar.

options.text: A. The manager see the report and signed it.
B. The manager saw the report and signed it.
C. The manager seen the report and signed it.
D. The manager seeing the report and signed it.

questions.text: What is the correct negative past form of "They finished the project"?
questions.explanation: Bentuk negatif Simple Past memakai 'did not + verb-1': 'They did not finish the project.'

options.text: A. They not finished the project.
B. They did not finished the project.
C. They did not finish the project.
D. They don't finish the project.

questions.text: Which is the correct past tense question form?
questions.explanation: Pertanyaan Simple Past memakai 'Did + subject + verb-1': 'Did you visit the museum yesterday?'

options.text: A. Did you visited the museum yesterday?
B. Did you visit the museum yesterday?
C. Do you visited the museum yesterday?
D. Are you visit the museum yesterday?

questions.text: Fill in the blank: "The conference ___ held in Jakarta last year."
questions.explanation: Kalimat pasif lampau memakai 'was/were + V3'. Karena 'conference' tunggal, jawabannya 'was'.

questions.text: What is the past form of "have"?
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau dari 'have/has' adalah 'had'.

questions.text: Choose the correct verb: "Yesterday, the workers ___ their safety helmets before entering the site."
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau 'wear' adalah 'wore'. Kalimat memakai 'yesterday' sehingga harus past tense.

questions.text: What is the past form of "take"?
questions.explanation: 'Take' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya (V2) adalah 'took'.

questions.text: Which time expression is most suitable for the Simple Past Tense?
questions.explanation: Keterangan waktu lampau seperti 'last night', 'yesterday', dan 'two days ago' menyertai Simple Past.

questions.text: Identify the regular verb among the following.
questions.explanation: Regular verb membentuk past tense dengan -ed. 'Walk' menjadi 'walked'. Go, eat, dan write adalah irregular.

questions.text: What is the past form of "write"?
questions.explanation: 'Write' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya (V2) adalah 'wrote', dan V3-nya 'written'.

questions.text: Choose the sentence with the correct past tense of "run".
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau 'run' adalah 'ran'. 'The workers ran to the assembly point' benar.

options.text: A. The workers runned to the assembly point.
B. The workers ran to the assembly point.
C. The workers run to the assembly point yesterday.
D. The workers running to the assembly point.

questions.text: What is the past form of "buy"?
questions.explanation: 'Buy' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya adalah 'bought'.

questions.text: Fill in the blank: "We ___ very tired after the long field trip."
questions.explanation: Subjek jamak 'we' memakai 'were' sebagai bentuk lampau dari 'are'.

questions.text: What is the past form of "meet"?
questions.explanation: 'Meet' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya adalah 'met'.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses "did" in a past tense question?
questions.explanation: Setelah 'did', kata kerja harus dalam bentuk dasar (V1): 'Where did the accident happen?'

options.text: A. Where did the accident happened?
B. Where did the accident happen?
C. Where the accident did happen?
D. Where does the accident happen?

questions.text: Which of the following is a time connective used to start a sequence?
questions.explanation: 'First' digunakan untuk memulai urutan peristiwa. 'Finally' menutup, sedangkan 'because' dan 'although' bukan time connective.

questions.text: Which time connective is best to end a sequence of events?
questions.explanation: 'Finally' digunakan untuk menutup atau mengakhiri rangkaian peristiwa.

questions.text: Which word is a time connective?
questions.explanation: 'After that' menunjukkan urutan waktu. 'Therefore', 'because', dan 'such as' bukan penanda urutan waktu.

questions.text: Choose the correct order of time connectives to show a sequence.
questions.explanation: Urutan yang logis: First, then, next, finally — menandai awal hingga akhir rangkaian peristiwa.

questions.text: Fill in the blank: "We registered at the office. ___, we walked into the laboratory."
questions.explanation: Untuk menunjukkan kejadian berikutnya digunakan 'After that' (setelah itu).

questions.text: Which time connective means "at the same time"?
questions.explanation: 'Meanwhile' berarti 'sementara itu' atau 'pada saat yang sama'.

questions.text: Which time connective refers to something that happened earlier (before)?
questions.explanation: 'Previously' berarti 'sebelumnya', menunjuk peristiwa yang terjadi lebih awal.

questions.text: "On the first day, the trainees toured the plant." The phrase "On the first day" functions as a ....
questions.explanation: 'On the first day' adalah penanda waktu (time connective/marker) yang menunjukkan kapan peristiwa terjadi.

questions.text: Which sentence uses a time connective correctly?
questions.explanation: 'Then, the supervisor inspected the machines' menggunakan 'then' dengan benar untuk menandai kejadian berikutnya.

options.text: A. The supervisor inspected then the machines.
B. Then, the supervisor inspected the machines.
C. The supervisor then because inspected the machines.
D. Inspected the supervisor then machines.

questions.text: Which group consists ONLY of time connectives?
questions.explanation: First, then, after that, finally semuanya adalah penanda urutan waktu. Pilihan lain mengandung penghubung sebab/kontras.

options.text: A. first, then, after that, finally

questions.text: Which time connective best fits: "___ the inspection, the workers received their certificates." (meaning after the inspection)
questions.explanation: 'After' menunjukkan kejadian yang terjadi setelah peristiwa lain. 'After the inspection, ...' tepat.

questions.text: Which of these is an action verb?
questions.explanation: Action verb menunjukkan tindakan. 'Visited' (mengunjungi) adalah action verb; is/seem/appear adalah relational/linking verbs.

questions.text: Which sentence contains an action verb in the past tense?
questions.explanation: 'The mayor opened the event' menggunakan action verb 'opened' dalam bentuk lampau.

options.text: A. The hall was very big.
B. The mayor opened the event.

questions.text: Which of the following is a passive voice sentence in the past?
questions.explanation: Passive past memakai 'was/were + V3'. 'A new policy was introduced last month' adalah kalimat pasif.

options.text: A. The manager introduced a new policy.
B. A new policy was introduced last month.
C. The manager is introducing a new policy.
D. The manager will introduce a new policy.

questions.text: Change to passive: "The mayor opened the event."
questions.explanation: Bentuk pasifnya: 'The event was opened by the mayor.'

options.text: A. The event was opened by the mayor.
B. The event is opened by the mayor.
C. The mayor was opened by the event.
D. The event opened the mayor.

questions.text: Which set contains only action verbs?
questions.explanation: Went, arrived, explained, announced semuanya action verbs. Pilihan lain mengandung is/are/seem (relational).

questions.text: The correct passive past form of "They built the factory in 1990" is ....
questions.explanation: Pasifnya: 'The factory was built in 1990.'

options.text: A. The factory was built in 1990.
B. The factory is built in 1990.
C. The factory were built in 1990.

questions.text: Why might a factual recount prefer "The safety briefing was given" over "The officer gave the safety briefing"?
questions.explanation: Kalimat pasif menekankan peristiwa/objek (the safety briefing) daripada pelaku, sesuai gaya laporan formal yang objektif.

options.text: A. To focus on the action/event rather than the doer
B. To make the doer more important
C. To change the time to present

questions.text: Which word in this sentence is the action verb: "The participants discussed important issues"?
questions.explanation: 'Discussed' adalah action verb yang menunjukkan tindakan yang dilakukan para peserta.

questions.text: Identify the passive sentence.
questions.explanation: 'The report was written by the safety officer' adalah pasif (was + V3 + by). Sisanya kalimat aktif.

options.text: A. The safety officer wrote the report.
B. The report was written by the safety officer.
C. The safety officer writes the report.
D. The safety officer is writing the report.

questions.text: Complete the action verb: "The director ___ the new safety program last week."
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau 'announce' adalah 'announced', cocok dengan 'last week'.

questions.text: Which of these is a specific noun phrase that improves factual accuracy in a recount?
questions.explanation: Frasa spesifik seperti 'on August 17, 1945' memberi tanggal yang tepat, menjaga keakuratan fakta.

questions.text: Which is a proper (specific) noun suitable for a factual recount?
questions.explanation: 'President Joko Widodo' adalah nama spesifik (proper noun) yang menjaga keakuratan fakta.

questions.text: In K3 (OHS) English, what does "PPE" stand for?
questions.explanation: PPE = Personal Protective Equipment, yaitu Alat Pelindung Diri (APD).

questions.text: The English term for "bahaya" in a workplace context is ....
questions.explanation: 'Bahaya' di tempat kerja diterjemahkan sebagai 'hazard(s)'.

questions.text: The English term for "prosedur" is ....
questions.explanation: 'Prosedur' dalam bahasa Inggris adalah 'procedures'.

questions.text: Which noun phrase is the MOST specific?
questions.explanation: 'The National Museum in Jakarta' lebih spesifik daripada 'a museum', 'that place', atau 'somewhere'.

options.text: C. The National Museum in Jakarta

questions.text: Why does a factual recount avoid vague words like "a lot of things" and "some people"?
questions.explanation: Kata samar mengurangi keakuratan; recount fakta memerlukan informasi yang spesifik dan tepat.

options.text: A. Because they are too formal
B. Because vague words reduce factual accuracy
C. Because they are grammatically wrong
D. Because they are too long

questions.text: Which sentence contains a specific time reference suitable for a factual recount?
questions.explanation: 'The agreement was signed on January 5, 2020' memberi tanggal pasti yang akurat.

options.text: A. The agreement was signed once upon a time.
B. The agreement was signed on January 5, 2020.
C. The agreement was signed sometime ago.
D. The agreement was signed someday.

questions.text: The English term for "lokasi kerja" is ....
questions.explanation: 'Lokasi kerja' dalam bahasa Inggris adalah 'work location(s)'.

questions.text: In a safety incident recount, which detail is most important for factual accuracy?
questions.explanation: Waktu, tempat, dan orang yang terlibat yang spesifik penting untuk keakuratan laporan kejadian.

options.text: A. The writer's feelings about the event
B. The exact time, place, and people involved
C. Imaginary causes of the accident
D. The writer's opinion on safety

questions.text:
Read: "Last Monday, our class visited a manufacturing factory in Bekasi. First, the safety officer explained the rules. Then, we were given helmets and vests. After that, we toured the production line. Finally, we returned to school. It was a very useful experience." 

Where did the class go?
questions.explanation: Teks menyebut mereka mengunjungi 'a manufacturing factory in Bekasi'.

options.text: B. A manufacturing factory in Bekasi

questions.text: Based on the text about the factory visit, when did the visit happen?
questions.explanation: Orientasi menyebutkan 'Last Monday', sehingga kunjungan terjadi Senin lalu.

questions.text: In the factory text, what did the students receive before touring the production line?
questions.explanation: Teks menyatakan 'we were given helmets and vests' sebelum berkeliling.

questions.text: In the factory text, who explained the rules?
questions.explanation: Teks menyebut 'the safety officer explained the rules'.

questions.text: In the factory text, the sentence "It was a very useful experience" functions as the ....
questions.explanation: Kalimat penutup yang memberi kesan umum/penilaian termasuk Reorientation.

questions.text: In the factory text, "we were given helmets and vests" is an example of ....
questions.explanation: 'Were given' adalah bentuk pasif lampau (passive voice in past tense).

questions.text: How many time connectives can you find in the factory text (First, Then, After that, Finally)?
questions.explanation: Terdapat empat penanda waktu: First, Then, After that, Finally.

questions.text:
Read: "Yesterday, an accident occurred at the construction site. At 10 a.m., a worker slipped on a wet floor. Immediately, the supervisor stopped the work. The injured worker was taken to the clinic. Finally, the area was cleaned and marked with a warning sign." 

What caused the accident?
questions.explanation: Teks menyatakan pekerja terpeleset di lantai basah (slipped on a wet floor).

options.text: B. A wet floor that made a worker slip

questions.text: In the accident text, what did the supervisor do immediately?
questions.explanation: Teks menyatakan 'the supervisor stopped the work' segera setelah kecelakaan.

questions.text: In the accident text, "The injured worker was taken to the clinic" is a ....
questions.explanation: 'Was taken' adalah passive voice dalam bentuk lampau.

questions.text: In the accident text, what time did the worker slip?
questions.explanation: Teks menyebut 'At 10 a.m., a worker slipped'.

questions.text: In the accident text, what was done to the area at the end?
questions.explanation: Teks menyatakan area dibersihkan dan diberi rambu peringatan ('cleaned and marked with a warning sign').

options.text: B. It was cleaned and marked with a warning sign.

questions.text: The accident text is an example of which type of recount?
questions.explanation: Karena melaporkan kejadian faktual (kecelakaan kerja) secara kronologis, teks ini adalah factual recount.

questions.text: Which sentence from the accident text belongs to the orientation?
questions.explanation: 'Yesterday, an accident occurred at the construction site' memperkenalkan kapan, apa, dan di mana (orientation).

options.text: A. Yesterday, an accident occurred at the construction site.
B. The supervisor stopped the work.
C. The injured worker was taken to the clinic.
D. The area was cleaned and marked.

questions.text: Read: "The training started at 8 a.m. The participants learned how to use a fire extinguisher. They practiced in the yard. The session ended at noon." Which time connective could best be added at the beginning of the second sentence to show sequence?
questions.explanation: 'First' cocok untuk memulai urutan, menandai kegiatan pertama setelah pelatihan dimulai.

questions.text: Which of the following best rewrites "The team finished the inspection" into passive voice?
questions.explanation: Pasifnya: 'The inspection was finished by the team.'

options.text: A. The inspection was finished by the team.
B. The inspection is finished by the team.
C. The team was finished by the inspection.
D. The inspection finishes the team.

questions.text: Which statement about recount and descriptive texts is TRUE?
questions.explanation: Recount memakai Simple Past, sedangkan descriptive memakai Simple Present. Ini perbedaan utama keduanya.

options.text: A. Both use the simple present tense
B. Recount uses past tense; descriptive uses present tense
C. Both focus on physical features of objects
D. Recount uses imperatives; descriptive uses questions

questions.text: Which sentence is grammatically correct for a recount?
questions.explanation: 'After we had registered, the tour began' menggunakan urutan tense lampau yang benar (past perfect + simple past).

options.text: A. After we registered, the tour begins.
B. After we had registered, the tour began.
C. After we registering, the tour began.
D. After we registers, the tour began.

questions.text: What is the past form of "speak"?
questions.explanation: 'Speak' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya (V2) adalah 'spoke'.

questions.text: What is the past form of "leave"?
questions.explanation: 'Leave' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya adalah 'left'.

questions.text: Choose the correct past tense form: "The engineer ___ the problem and ___ a solution."
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau yang tepat: 'identified' dan 'found' (find -> found).

questions.text: Which sentence shows the correct use of "meanwhile" as a time connective?
questions.explanation: 'The team inspected the machines; meanwhile, the others recorded the data' memakai 'meanwhile' (sementara itu) dengan benar.

options.text: A. The team inspected the machines because meanwhile data.
B. The team inspected the machines; meanwhile, the others recorded the data.
C. Meanwhile the data the team inspected machines.
D. The team meanwhile because inspected the data.

questions.text: Arrange to form a correct recount sentence: "the / opened / mayor / event / the"
questions.explanation: Susunan SVO yang benar: 'The mayor opened the event.'

options.text: A. The mayor opened the event.
B. The event the mayor opened.
C. Opened the mayor the event.
D. The mayor the event opened.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly reports a past event using a specific date?
questions.explanation: 'Indonesia proclaimed its independence on August 17, 1945' menggabungkan past tense dengan tanggal spesifik.

options.text: A. Indonesia proclaims its independence on August 17, 1945.
B. Indonesia proclaimed its independence on August 17, 1945.
C. Indonesia will proclaim its independence on August 17, 1945.
D. Indonesia proclaim its independence on August 17, 1945.

questions.text: Which sentence belongs in the series of events, NOT the orientation?
questions.explanation: 'Then, we observed the welding process' menceritakan satu kejadian dalam rangkaian, bukan latar belakang.

options.text: A. Last week, our class went on a field trip.
B. Then, we observed the welding process.
C. My name is Andi and I am a student.
D. It was a sunny Monday morning.

questions.text: What does a recount text NOT usually include?
questions.explanation: Recount fakta tidak menyertakan opini imajinatif atau khayalan; isinya peristiwa faktual.

options.text: D. Action verbs in the past

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses an action verb and a time connective together?
questions.explanation: 'First, the workers checked the equipment' memuat time connective (First) dan action verb lampau (checked).

options.text: A. The equipment is very heavy.
B. First, the workers checked the equipment.

questions.text: Which best describes the tone/style of a factual recount?
questions.explanation: Factual recount bersifat formal, objektif, dan informatif, melaporkan fakta secara netral.

questions.text: Choose the sentence with the correct past tense of "hold".
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau 'hold' adalah 'held'. 'The seminar was held in March' benar (pasif).

options.text: A. The seminar was holded in March.
B. The seminar was held in March.
C. The seminar was holds in March.
D. The seminar was holding in March.

questions.text: Which sentence is the best example of an orientation for a recount about a work training?
questions.explanation: Orientation memberi latar: 'Last month, twenty employees attended a safety training at the head office.'

options.text: A. In conclusion, the training was useful.
B. Last month, twenty employees attended a safety training at the head office.
C. Then, they practiced first aid.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses the past tense verb "feel"?
questions.explanation: Bentuk lampau 'feel' adalah 'felt'. 'Everyone felt safe after the briefing' benar.

options.text: A. Everyone feeled safe after the briefing.
B. Everyone felt safe after the briefing.
C. Everyone feels safe after the briefing yesterday.
D. Everyone feeling safe after the briefing.

questions.text: In the sentence "The award was given to the safety team," who/what is emphasized?
questions.explanation: Karena pasif, fokusnya pada 'the award' (peristiwa/objek), bukan pemberi penghargaan.

options.text: A. The doer (who gave the award)
C. The time of the event
D. The reason for the award

questions.text: Which is the correct sequence of a recount's generic structure from beginning to end?
questions.explanation: Urutannya: Orientation (awal) -> Series of Events (tengah) -> Reorientation (akhir).

options.text: C. Orientation -> Series of Events -> Reorientation

questions.text: Which sentence uses the wrong tense for a recount and should be corrected?
questions.explanation: 'We arrive at the site early in the morning' salah karena recount perlu past tense ('arrived').

options.text: A. We arrived at the site early in the morning.
B. We arrive at the site early in the morning.
C. We left the site at noon.
D. We saw the new machines.

questions.text: The phrase "two days ago" indicates that the action happened in the ....
questions.explanation: 'Two days ago' menunjuk waktu lampau, sehingga tindakan terjadi di masa lalu.

questions.text: Which connective shows that one event happened right after another?
questions.explanation: 'Then' / 'after that' menandai peristiwa yang terjadi tepat setelah peristiwa sebelumnya.

questions.text: A biography of a national hero is best classified as which sub-type of recount?
questions.explanation: Biografi melaporkan peristiwa nyata kehidupan seseorang, sehingga termasuk factual/historical recount.

questions.text: Which sentence is in active voice (not passive)?
questions.explanation: 'The committee organized the seminar' adalah aktif (subjek melakukan tindakan). Sisanya pasif.

options.text: A. The seminar was organized by the committee.
B. The committee organized the seminar.
C. The report was submitted on time.
D. The event was opened by the director.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly combines a time connective and the passive voice?
questions.explanation: 'Finally, the certificates were handed out to the participants' menggabungkan 'finally' dengan pasif lampau dengan benar.

options.text: A. Finally, the certificates were handed out to the participants.
B. Finally, the certificates hands out to the participants.
C. Finally, hand out the certificates to the participants.
D. Finally, the certificates is handed out to participants.

questions.text: What is the past form of "come"?
questions.explanation: 'Come' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya adalah 'came'.

questions.text: Which sentence is the best reorientation for a recount about a successful safety drill?
questions.explanation: Reorientation menutup dengan kesimpulan/kesan: 'Overall, the drill ran smoothly and everyone learned a lot.'

options.text: A. The drill started at 9 a.m.
B. Overall, the drill ran smoothly and everyone learned a lot.
D. Then, we gathered at the assembly point.

questions.text: What is the past form of "give"?
questions.explanation: 'Give' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya (V2) adalah 'gave'.

questions.text: Identify the recount text from the following openings.
questions.explanation: 'Last year, I joined an internship at a chemical plant' membuka cerita pengalaman lampau (recount).

options.text: A. To make a fire extinguisher work, follow these steps.
B. Last year, I joined an internship at a chemical plant.
C. A helmet is a protective device worn on the head.
D. Smoking should be banned in all workplaces.

questions.text: Which word is NOT a time connective?
questions.explanation: 'Because' adalah penghubung sebab (cause), bukan penanda urutan waktu. First, then, finally adalah time connectives.

questions.text: Read: "On the second day, the trainees visited the laboratory. They were shown how to handle chemicals safely. Later, they wrote a short report." Which sentence is passive?
questions.explanation: 'They were shown how to handle chemicals safely' memakai 'were shown' (pasif lampau).

options.text: A. On the second day, the trainees visited the laboratory.
B. They were shown how to handle chemicals safely.
C. Later, they wrote a short report.
D. The trainees visited the laboratory.

questions.text: In the laboratory text above, the phrase "On the second day" is used to ....
questions.explanation: 'On the second day' adalah penanda waktu yang menunjukkan urutan kronologis kejadian.

options.text: B. Show the time sequence of events

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses "finally" to close a recount?
questions.explanation: 'Finally, we went home feeling satisfied' memakai 'finally' untuk menutup rangkaian peristiwa dengan benar.

options.text: A. Finally we feeling satisfied home went.
B. Finally, we went home feeling satisfied.
C. We finally because home went.
D. Home we finally went satisfied feeling.

questions.text: Which sentence shows correct subject-verb agreement in the past tense?
questions.explanation: 'The workers were trained yesterday' benar; subjek jamak 'workers' memakai 'were'.

options.text: A. The workers was trained yesterday.
B. The workers were trained yesterday.
C. The workers is trained yesterday.
D. The workers are trained yesterday.

questions.text: Which detail would make a workplace incident recount MORE factual?
questions.explanation: Detail spesifik seperti waktu, lokasi, dan nama yang tepat membuat laporan kejadian lebih faktual dan akurat.

options.text: B. Adding the exact time, location, and names

questions.text: What is the past form of "make"?
questions.explanation: 'Make' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya adalah 'made'.

questions.text: Which of these is the correct passive of "The supervisor checked all the machines"?
questions.explanation: Pasifnya: 'All the machines were checked by the supervisor.'

options.text: A. All the machines were checked by the supervisor.
B. All the machines was checked by the supervisor.
C. The supervisor were checked by all the machines.
D. All the machines are checked by the supervisor.

questions.text: Which sentence best shows the social function of a recount (to inform about what happened)?
questions.explanation: 'The team reported what happened during the evacuation drill' menyampaikan informasi tentang peristiwa yang terjadi.

options.text: A. Please follow the evacuation steps.
B. The team reported what happened during the evacuation drill.
C. The exit door is red and wide.
D. We must improve our safety culture.

questions.text: What is the past form of "see"?
questions.explanation: 'See' adalah irregular verb; bentuk lampaunya (V2) adalah 'saw'.

flashcards.back: Teks yang menceritakan kembali peristiwa atau pengalaman yang sudah terjadi di masa lampau secara kronologis.
To inform or entertain by retelling past events (memberi informasi atau menghibur dengan menceritakan peristiwa lampau).
Recount berdasarkan fakta, data, dan bukti; objektif dan informatif, tanpa opini/imajinasi.
1. Orientation, 2. Series of Events, 3. Reorientation (opsional).
Bagian pembuka: memperkenalkan siapa, kapan, di mana, dan apa yang terjadi (latar belakang).
Inti teks: menceritakan urutan kejadian secara kronologis (berdasarkan waktu).
Penutup opsional: pernyataan ulang/kesimpulan atau kesan umum tentang peristiwa.
Simple Past Tense, karena menceritakan peristiwa yang telah selesai.
Subject + Verb-2 (V2). Contoh: We visited the factory.
Subject + did not + Verb-1. Contoh: They did not finish the project.
Did + subject + Verb-1? Contoh: Did you visit the museum?
go-went, see-saw, take-took, begin-began, write-wrote, have-had, come-came, give-gave.
Kata kerja tindakan yang menunjukkan peristiwa. Contoh: went, arrived, began, explained, visited, announced.
was/were + Verb-3. Contoh: The event was opened by the mayor.
Untuk menekankan peristiwa/objek, bukan pelakunya; cocok untuk laporan formal yang objektif.
Kata penghubung waktu untuk urutan kronologis: first, then, next, after that, finally, meanwhile, previously.
Meanwhile = sementara itu (pada saat yang sama). Previously = sebelumnya (lebih awal).
Memakai nama, tempat, tanggal yang tepat untuk keakuratan fakta. Contoh: President Joko Widodo, August 17, 1945.
APD = PPE (Personal Protective Equipment); Bahaya = Hazards; Lokasi Kerja = Work Locations; Prosedur = Procedures.
Recount: past tense, action verbs, time connectives. Descriptive: present tense, adjectives, relational verbs.
Narrative punya konflik (complication) dan resolution; recount hanya melaporkan urutan peristiwa tanpa konflik wajib.
Diary entry, biography, news report, personal experience, incident report.

mindmap.label: Recount Text
mindmap.content: Teks yang menceritakan kembali peristiwa atau pengalaman masa lampau secara kronologis, objektif, dan faktual.

mindmap.label: Definition & Function
mindmap.content: Recount adalah teks yang me-retell peristiwa lampau; fungsinya memberi informasi atau menghibur.

mindmap.label: Factual Recount
mindmap.content: Berdasarkan fakta, data, dan bukti; bersifat objektif tanpa opini atau imajinasi.

mindmap.label: Social Purpose
mindmap.content: Melaporkan apa yang terjadi, kapan, di mana, siapa terlibat, dan bagaimana urutannya.

mindmap.label: Types
mindmap.content: Personal recount, factual recount, historical/biography, dan incident report.

mindmap.label: vs Narrative
mindmap.content: Narrative punya konflik dan resolusi; recount hanya melaporkan urutan peristiwa.

mindmap.label: Generic Structure
mindmap.content: Tiga bagian: Orientation, Series of Events, dan Reorientation (opsional).

mindmap.label: Orientation
mindmap.content: Pembuka: memperkenalkan siapa, kapan, di mana, dan apa yang terjadi (latar belakang).

mindmap.label: Series of Events
mindmap.content: Inti teks: menceritakan urutan kejadian secara kronologis berdasarkan waktu.

mindmap.label: Reorientation
mindmap.content: Penutup opsional: pernyataan ulang, kesimpulan, atau kesan umum tentang peristiwa.

mindmap.label: Language Features
mindmap.content: Ciri kebahasaan utama: past tense, action verbs, passive voice, time connectives, dan kata benda spesifik.

mindmap.label: Past Tense Dominant
mindmap.content: Simple Past Tense mendominasi karena peristiwa sudah selesai terjadi.

mindmap.label: Personal Pronouns
mindmap.content: I, we, they digunakan untuk merujuk para partisipan yang terlibat.

mindmap.label: Adverbs of Time & Place
mindmap.content: Yesterday, at the harbor: menunjukkan kapan dan di mana peristiwa terjadi.

mindmap.label: Simple Past Tense
mindmap.content: Pola: Subject + V2 (positif), did not + V1 (negatif), Did + S + V1 (tanya).

mindmap.label: Regular Verbs
mindmap.content: Dibentuk dengan -ed/-d. Contoh: walk-walked, arrive-arrived, visit-visited.

mindmap.label: Irregular Verbs
mindmap.content: Berubah bentuk. Contoh: go-went, see-saw, take-took, begin-began, write-wrote.

mindmap.label: Was / Were
mindmap.content: Bentuk lampau to be: was (tunggal) dan were (jamak/you).

mindmap.label: Time Signals
mindmap.content: Yesterday, last week, two days ago, in 1990 menyertai Simple Past.

mindmap.label: Time Connectives
mindmap.content: Kata penghubung waktu untuk menunjukkan urutan kronologis peristiwa.

mindmap.label: Starting
mindmap.content: First, on the first day: memulai rangkaian peristiwa.

mindmap.label: Middle / Sequence
mindmap.content: Then, next, after that, meanwhile, previously: menghubungkan kejadian.

mindmap.label: Ending
mindmap.content: Finally, at last: menutup atau mengakhiri rangkaian peristiwa.

mindmap.label: Action Verbs & Passive
mindmap.content: Action verbs menunjukkan tindakan; passive voice menekankan peristiwa/objek.

mindmap.label: Action Verbs
mindmap.content: Kata kerja tindakan lampau: went, arrived, began, explained, announced, visited.

mindmap.label: Passive Voice
mindmap.content: was/were + V3. Contoh: The event was opened by the mayor.

mindmap.label: Why Passive
mindmap.content: Menekankan peristiwa atau objek, bukan pelakunya; cocok untuk laporan formal.

mindmap.label: Specific Nouns
mindmap.content: Memakai nama, tempat, tanggal spesifik untuk menjaga keakuratan fakta.

mindmap.label: Names & Dates
mindmap.content: Contoh: President Joko Widodo, on August 17, 1945, the National Museum.

mindmap.label: K3 / OHS Vocabulary
mindmap.content: PPE (APD), Hazards (bahaya), Work Locations (lokasi kerja), Procedures (prosedur).

mindmap.label: Accuracy
mindmap.content: Hindari kata samar (a lot of, some people) agar fakta tetap akurat.

mindmap.label: Example & Practice
mindmap.content: Contoh recount: kunjungan pabrik, laporan kecelakaan kerja, pelatihan keselamatan.

mindmap.label: Sample Orientation
mindmap.content: Last Monday, our class visited a manufacturing factory in Bekasi.

mindmap.label: Sample Events
mindmap.content: First the officer explained the rules; then we were given helmets and vests.

mindmap.label: Sample Reorientation
mindmap.content: All in all, it was a very useful and unforgettable experience.
